situation: audit-cycle-state was cycle-complete (sunset-prediction fixes all resolved). Triggered new full deep audit. Selected shizi (never audited, PROGRESS stale 8.1 days, #2 scout recommendation). Shizi is a Chrome browser extension for OCR text counting on e-commerce images.

outcome_evidence: Wrote .claude/audits/audit-2026-07-07-047.md (543 lines). Updated audit-cycle-state.json: status=fix-in-progress, 57 route-fixes pending, 2 structural debts queued, 2 direction-shifts deferred. Findings span 8H/25M/26L/2I across all 4 modules.
next_suggestion: 派生 SZ-BG-H-001 fix: message handler input validation (highest security impact)
派生 SZ-PP-H-001 fix: image upload file size limit (memory bomb prevention)
派生 SZ-SH-H-001 fix: reduce host_permissions from <all_urls> to specific origins

audit_findings.finding: Message handler trusts unvalidated fields from chrome.runtime messages — settings injection vector
audit_findings.remediation: Validate all incoming message fields against whitelist schema before processing

audit_findings.finding: blobToBase64 uses O(n²) string concatenation for large binary data
audit_findings.remediation: Replace with Blob → ArrayBuffer → Uint8Array → btoa chain or FileReader.readAsDataURL

audit_findings.finding: Tile ownership quadrant check drops valid results near tile boundaries
audit_findings.remediation: Use overlap-based assignment instead of strict quadrant check

audit_findings.finding: containerRef assigned to two different DOM elements causing erratic layout
audit_findings.remediation: Use separate refs for each element or conditional ref assignment

audit_findings.finding: Drag always moves region[0] regardless of which region was clicked
audit_findings.remediation: Track dragged region index in state, use it in mousemove handler

audit_findings.finding: No file size limit on image upload — memory bomb via large file base64 encoding
host_permissions grants <all_urls> but extension never uses tab/scripting APIs
audit_findings.remediation: Remove host_permissions entirely or restrict to specific API domains used

audit_findings.finding: filterByRegion test duplicates source code — tests verify copy, not actual implementation
audit_findings.remediation: Import actual filterByRegion from source; restructure test to exercise real code path
